hero.titleLine1: Dental Veneers: A Simple Way to
hero.tagline: Crafted Smiles with Precision, Art & Technology
hero.description: At Prudentia Micro Dental Care, Pimple Saudagar we specialize in enhancing your smile with precision-crafted dental veneers, thin, tooth-colored shells bonded to the front of your teeth to dramatically improve their shape, color, and appearance.

whatAre.title: What Are Dental Veneers?
whatAre.description: Dental veneers are ultra-thin, custom-made shells, typically made from porcelain or composite resin, that are permanently bonded to the front surface of your teeth. Veneers are an ideal solution for addressing a variety of cosmetic concerns, including:
concerns: Discoloration that doesn't respond to whitening
whatAre.footer: For most smile makeovers, veneers are applied to the top front 6 to 8 teeth to create a natural, symmetrical appearance.

types.title: Types of Dental Veneers

items.title: 1. Porcelain Veneers:
items.description: Durable, stain-resistant, and known for their natural tooth-like appearance. They typically require slight reshaping of the tooth structure.

items.title: 2. Composite Resin Veneers:
items.description: More conservative and quicker to apply, often completed in a single visit. Ideal for smaller cosmetic corrections.

types.footer: There are two main types of veneers we use at Prudentia: Our expert team will assess your needs and recommend the best type of veneer to meet your goals.

benefits.title: What Are the Benefits of Veneers?
benefits.intro: Dental veneers offer a comprehensive cosmetic solution with numerous advantages:
items: Instantly improve tooth shape and color
benefits.footer: With good oral hygiene and regular dental visits, porcelain veneers can last 10–20 years, offering a long-term solution to common smile concerns.

rightForYou.title: Are Veneers Right for You?
rightForYou.intro: If you're bothered by cosmetic imperfections in your front teeth, veneers might be your perfect solution. They're ideal for patients looking for:
items: A dramatic yet natural smile transformation
A minimally invasive alternative to crowns
A confidence boost from a brighter, more uniform smile

different.title: What Makes Prudentia Micro Dental Care Different?

items.title: The precision of advanced dental technology

different.footer: At Prudentia, we combine: ...to deliver a smile you'll love for years to come.

cta.title: Ready for a Smile Makeover?
cta.description: Whether it's one tooth or a full smile transformation, we can help you achieve a seamless, confident look with veneers. Schedule your Micro-Consultation at Prudentia Micro Dental Care today and take the first step toward your dream smile!
